title: FCoP REVIEW (Audit abstraction)
description: Abstraction 7 of 7 — Audit. Per ADR-0017, the REVIEW file type encodes a governance-layer decision about an artefact (TASK / REPORT / role-switch / code-change). v1.0 ships the MINIMAL surface only: 4-value decision enum + subject reference + optional rationale and required_changes. Per ADR-0017 §decision, v1.0 deliberately OMITS `needs_human` enum value, `human_approval` sub-object, `Project.mark_human_approved()` API, and admin-layer manual_file_edit guards. Those are deferred to v1.2 by ADR-0015 §non-goals to keep REVIEW from inflating into a deity role.

decisionEnum.description: Per ADR-0017 §decision. The 4-value enum is FROZEN for v1.0. v1.2 may extend additively (e.g. `needs_human`) but never removes a value.

subjectType.description: Per ADR-0017 §design-details. What kind of artefact this REVIEW is about. `code_change` is included so REVIEWs can target git diffs; `role_switch` lets a REVIEW audit a fcop.json roles edit.

review_id.description: Per ADR-0017 §filename-grammar. Equals the filename stem (no `.md`).

subject_ref.description: Reference to the artefact under review. Per ADR-0017: file path for task/report/code_change; for role_switch use the diff hash or the fcop.json line range.

reviewer_role.description: Per ADR-0017. The role code authoring this review. SHOULD have `review_decision` capability per boundary.schema.json.

reviewer_agent.description: Optional concrete agent identifier (e.g. session_id) on top of the role code. Per ADR-0020 §session_id.

rationale.description: Free-text rationale. SHOULD be present for `rejected` and `needs_changes`; MAY be omitted for `approved` and `abstained`. Per ADR-0017.

required_changes.description: Per ADR-0017. List of changes the reviewer requires before re-review. MUST be present and non-empty when decision = `needs_changes`; MUST be empty or omitted otherwise. Implementations SHOULD validate this conditional.

then.$comment: Per ADR-0017: needs_changes implies non-empty required_changes.
